file: 1401_Tomasek 等 - JET Fuel Production from High Molecular Weight Fischer- Tropsch Paraffin Mixture.txt

experiments.description: 在Pt/H-ZSM5、Pt/H-Beta和Pt/H-[BAl]MCM22沸石催化剂上对高分子量费托石蜡混合物进行加氢裂化实验，反应温度250-350°C，压力40 bar，氢/烃比600 Ndm³/dm³，液时空速1.0 h⁻¹
experiments.text_snippet: In our experimental work we investigated the fuel purpose hydrocracking of high molecular weight Fischer-Tropsch wax on Pt/H-ZSM5, Pt/H-Beta and Pt/H-[BAl]MCM22 zeolite catalysts... Experiments were carried out in the temperature range of 250 - 350 °C, while pressure (40 bar), hydrogen / hydrocarbon ratio (600 Ndm3/dm3) and liquid hourly space velocity (1.0 h-1) were constant.

Feedstock.original: high molecular weight Fischer-Tropsch paraffin mixture, carbon number range: C13-C69, C21+ hydrocarbon content: > 99 %, pour point: 84 °C, density: 940 kg/m³

Catalyst composition.original: Pt/H-ZSM5: Pt 0.5 wt%, Al 0.025 mmol/g, Na 0.584 mmol/g, Si/Al 27.6

Catalyst loading.original: 1.8 cm³ (1.0 g) catalyst, particle size: 0.315-0.80 mm

Conversion rate.original: 20.1-95.5% (C21+ conversion depending on catalyst and temperature)
